name: WELLTOWER INC.
summary: PARTI General Welltower Inc. (NYSE:WELL), a real estate investment trust (REIT) and S&P 500 company, is positioned at the center of the silver economy, focusing on rental housing for aging seniors across the United States, United Kingdom and Canada. Our portfolio predominantly consists of 2,500+ seniors and wellness housing communities that are positioned at the intersection of housing and hospitality, creating vibrant communities for mature renters and older adults.More information is available...
